prices.source_phrase: Year-round discount: All military personnel, veterans, and military families receive a 25% discount on up to six General Admission tickets.
prices.source_block:
Military Discounts

Year-round discount: All military personnel, veterans, and military families receive a 25% discount on up to six General Admission tickets. To redeem, present your valid Military ID or Dependent ID when you check in or, if ordering online, enter promotional code “MIL” at checkout. Be prepared to present your valid Military ID or Dependent ID alongside your tickets when you check in at the Garden.

reservation.source_phrase: While tickets can generally be purchased at the door, we do occasionally sell out.
reservation.source_block:
GENERAL ADMISSION

Purchase your tickets in advance and save! While tickets can generally be purchased at the door, we do occasionally sell out. We strongly recommend making a reservation for our busiest days like Mother’s Day, exhibition openings, Thursday Summer Evenings, and school vacation weeks. Tickets are non-refundable.

CLICK HERE TO RESERVE GENERAL ADMISSION TICKETS

hours.source_block:
GENERAL ADMISSION HOURS

Open daily: 10 a.m.–5 p.m.
Last admission: 4:30 p.m.
